items.name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive Real Shot Dynamic Chip】【Low Key Hobo Medium Handbag】M24856 Black, m24974 Brown, m25022 White. Features an adjustable shoulder strap adorned with a classic plaque lock, and ample space to easily store laptops and other daily necessities.

items.name_en: 【Haiyuan Out-of-Stock Exclusive】83694 Blue Mini Bumbag. This Mini Bumbag from the LV Gradient series features a Monogram embossed rendering of gradient summer colors on Monogram Empreinte leather. The trendy design features a zippered main compartment and a Louis Vuitton leather tag on the front pocket. Versatile with removable chain and adjustable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it crossbody or on the shoulder. Dimensions: 17x12x9.5cm

items.name_en: 【Alma BB Handbag】m13078 Black Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【Alma BB Handbag】m13078 Black Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB handbag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration collection, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami's artwork, while the Toron handle, base, removable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Dimensions: 23.5x17.5x 11.5cm

items.name_en: 【Wallet on Chain go-14】 m13139 Black m13841 Brown
items.name_cn:
【Wallet on Chain go-14】 m13139 Black m13841 Brown
The Wallet on Chain go-14 uses exquisite quilted lambskin, continuing the brand's signature style. Lit by the LV twist lock, it easily handles day and night occasions. Removable round chain allows for versatile styling, also usable as a clutch.
Size:12 x 5 x 20 cm

items.name_en: 【LV x TM All in BB】 m13089 White Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【LV x TM All in BB】 m13089 White Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This All in BB bag conveys the playful style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue series through dynamic details. The monogram coated canvas presents vibrant rainbow tones, with the logo featuring bow and padlock decorations. The adjustable calfskin handle and leather shoulder strap allow for easy switching between handbag, shoulder, and crossbody styles.
Size:18 x 12 x 16 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 【Side Trunk Medium】m14046 White/Colorful (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【Side Trunk Medium】m14046 White/Colorful (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Medium bag presents a playful Monogram pattern in the style of the Takashi Murakami collection, incorporating reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-Lock into soft cowhide.
Easily accommodates daily essentials. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with detachable stud handles and shoulder straps for flexible carrying.
Dimensions: 23.5x16x8.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: M14282 Grey-White Clay
items.name_cn:
M14282 Grey-White Clay
This Go-14 Medium bag, designed by Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquière, draws inspiration from the Barcelona Güell Park, the setting of the 2025 Cruise early spring show. It features sprayed-effect lambskin to mimic the park's vibrant colors. The iconic Malletage quilting pattern is accented with eye-catching metal hardware, while pockets and a makeup mirror add functional details.
16 x 10 x 23 cm
(H x W x L)

specs.rawTitle:
M14282 Grey-White Clay

items.name_en: M25046 Patent Silver Clasp
items.name_cn:
M25046 Patent Silver Clasp
This Go-14 Malletage Medium bag from the 2024 Spring/Summer show is infused with a glossy patent leather body for a striking look. The quilted lambskin interprets the brand's classic Malletage pattern, while the polished LV Twist lock adds a refined touch. The chain and leather handles are both detachable, offering multiple styling possibilities.
23 x 16 x 10 cm
(L x H x W)

Paired with a lustrous chain, it can be elegantly carried over the shoulder or in hand. 22 x 14 x5
